trainers.name: Sophie
trainers.quote: We're going for the win! Hey-ho, let's go!
trainers.quote2: Ah, welcome! I'm your server today!

trainers.name: Sylvia
trainers.quote: I'm tough, that's all.
trainers.quote2: Listen! This is my chorus group. Me and my Pokémon!

trainers.name: Sylvia
trainers.quote: I'm tough, that's all.
trainers.quote2: Varrroooom! Watch me go full throttle!

trainers.name: Tasha
trainers.quote: I live only for battles. Only victories give me hope.
trainers.quote2: Hahah! Howdy!

trainers.quote: I live only for battles. Only victories give me hope.

trainers.name: Tavon
trainers.quote: *sssnork* *zzz*
trainers.quote2: Winning and losing isn't all there is to battling.

trainers.quote2: *stare*

trainers.name: Tiffani
trainers.quote: I'll check how your Pokémon have grown for you.
trainers.quote2: Hello, you there! Yes, you! Wait up a second, eh?

trainers.name: Titus
trainers.quote: The sweetest thing about battling? The finishing blow!
trainers.quote2: I got tips from my online friends on how to best raise my gang.

trainers.name: Titus
trainers.quote: The sweetest thing about battling? The finishing blow!
trainers.quote2: Can you explain why I'm here?

trainers.quote: Hey, you're looking nifty!
trainers.quote2: Shaah!

trainers.name: Tyrell
trainers.quote: Hey, you're looking nifty!
trainers.quote2: Oh, my, a mere child.

trainers.name: Tyrell
trainers.quote: Hey, you're looking nifty!
trainers.quote2: I've been here for years, but I never get tired of this.

trainers.name: Yvette
trainers.quote: You're sure you can handle me? I'm an ultrastellar talent.
trainers.quote2: It's no good to be too harsh... But pampering is also out.

trainers.name: Yvette
trainers.quote: You're sure you can handle me? I'm an ultrastellar talent.
trainers.quote2: A battle is... It is a love letter written in sand.
